instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: wolfSSL wolfMQTT 1.9 has a heap-based buffer overflow (4 bytes) in MqttDecode_Publish (called from MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket).
output: In wolfSSL wolfMQTT version 1.9, a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability exists, affecting the MqttDecode_Publish function. This issue is triggered when this function is invoked by MqttClient_DecodePacket and MqttClient_HandlePacket.
